where.if: and (title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
select id, title, difficulty, status, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from problems
order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}
select id, title, content, input_desc, output_desc, difficulty, knowledge_points, support_languages, status, created_at, updated_at from problems where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into problems ( title, slug, content, input_desc, output_desc, difficulty, knowledge_points, support_languages, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{problem.title}, null, #{problem.content}, #{problem.inputDesc}, #{problem.outputDesc}, #{problem.difficulty}, #{problem.knowledgePoints}, #{problem.supportLanguages}, #{problem.status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, now(), now() )
mapper.update: update problems set title = #{problem.title}, content = #{problem.content}, input_desc = #{problem.inputDesc}, output_desc = #{problem.outputDesc}, difficulty = #{problem.difficulty}, knowledge_points = #{problem.knowledgePoints}, support_languages = #{problem.supportLanguages}, status = #{problem.status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() where id = #{problem.id}
update problems set status = -1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into problem_tags (problem_id, tag_id, created_at) values (#{problemId}, #{tagId}, now())
mapper.select:
select count(1) from tags where id in
#{tagId}
select tag_id from problem_tags where problem_id = #{problemId} order by tag_id asc
select t.tag_name from problem_tags pt join tags t on t.id = pt.tag_id where pt.problem_id = #{problemId} order by t.id asc

select id, case_type as caseType, input_data as inputData, output_data as outputData, score, sort_order as sortOrder, is_active as isActive from testcases where problem_id = #{problemId} order by sort_order asc, id asc
